text.title: React Component Architecture Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: SaaS dashboard with feature folders + RSC
example.note: routing=next_app_router; folder_layout features=src/features/<name>/, primitives=src/components/ui/; primitive_layer=shadcn-vendored; state_strategy global=Context for theme+auth+flags, feature=Zustand per feature (cart, filters, notifications); memoisation_policy=profiler_only; client_marker_required=true. Cart-count update re-renders only cart subtree (Zustand selector); RSC bundle stays slim; design-system PR rejected when Button imports authStore.

example.title: Context-as-state-bus rewrite
example.note: Engineer used Context for everything: cart, filters, notifications. Profiler showed 180 components rerendering on cart-add. Tree caught: context-only-for-truly-global → move feature state to Zustand stores. Rewrite reduced re-render fan-out by 30x.
